description.value: By allowing yourself to drown in ambient emotions, you can cause them to spill over and erupt around you in a cathartic flow of primal energy. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Vibe Check] as a 4th-rank primal innate spell four times per day. You must select a different emotion each time you Cast the Spell in a day, and the emotion must match your current soulfeel (or wonder, if you select fear).
